mapper.sql: mu.id, mu.plan_id, mu.material_id, mu.use_num, mu.use_user, mu.use_date, mu.use_remark, mu.create_time, p.plan_name as plan_name, m.material_name as material_name, u.username as use_user_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_material_use mu LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON mu.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN train_material m ON mu.material_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON mu.use_user = u.id WHERE mu.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_material_use (plan_id, material_id, use_num, use_user, use_date, use_remark, create_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{materialId}, #{useNum}, #{useUser}, #{useDate}, #{useRemark}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM train_material_use WHERE id IN #{id}
